text:
Yuanmo (Momo) Xie
Yuanmo Xie (Momo) is an Assistant Professor of Practice in Interactive Media and Business (IMB) at NYU Shanghai. She is a versatile visual artist and social media content creator. She is also a Danish-certified architect with a strong interest in community-focused social innovation, particularly in sustainable lifestyles and healthcare design.

text_blocks.text: Yuanmo Xie (Momo) is an Assistant Professor of Practice in Interactive Media and Business (IMB) at NYU Shanghai. She is a versatile visual artist and social media content creator. She is also a Danish-certified architect with a strong interest in community-focused social innovation, particularly in sustainable lifestyles and healthcare design.
